article.description: — Jalen Brunson scored 35 points, Josh Hart added 21 and the New York Knicks advanced to the NBA Cup semifinals for the first time in three tries by beating the struggling Toronto Raptors 117-101 on Tuesday night.
article.headline: Brunson scores 35 points as Knicks rout Raptors 117-101 to reach NBA Cup semifinals for first time

images.caption: New York Knicks vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights
images.name: New York Knicks vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights

article.linkText: Brunson scores 35 points as Knicks rout Raptors 117-101 to reach NBA Cup semifinals for first time
article.story: TORONTO -- — Jalen Brunson scored 35 points, Josh Hart added 21 and the New York Knicks advanced to the NBA Cup semifinals for the first time in three tries by beating the struggling Toronto Raptors 117-101 on Tuesday night. Karl-Anthony Towns had 14 points and 16 rebounds for the Knicks, who will face Orlando in the semifinal round at Las Vegas on Saturday. The Magic reached the semifinals by beating Miami earlier Tuesday. Towns returned after sitting out Sunday’s home win over Orlando because of tightness in his left calf. Mikal Bridges scored 15 points for New York and OG Anunoby had 13 against his former team. The only team to reach the quarterfinals in all three years of the event, the Knicks had lost their previous two appearances by a combined 32 points. New York is 11-4 all-time in NBA Cup play. Brunson’s 26 points in the opening half were his most in any half this season. Brandon Ingram scored 31 points and Jamal Shead had a career-high 18 but the short-handed Raptors lost their fourth straight, all at home. Scottie Barnes and Ja’Kobe Walter each scored 13 points for the Raptors, and Jakob Poeltl added 10. Toronto went unbeaten in group stage play with all four wins coming during a stretch that saw the Raptors go 13-1. They’re 1-6 since. Ingram had 17 in the first quarter but the entire Raptors team couldn’t combine to match that total in the second. Toronto missed 13 of its first 15 shot attempts and finished 5 for 21 in a disastrous frame that saw the Raptors outscored 34-13. New York led 69-52 at the half. Neither of Toronto’s former Knicks was available Tuesday. Immanuel Quickley sat because of an illness while RJ Barrett missed his ninth straight game because of a sprained right knee. Up next Knicks: Play Orlando in the semifinal at Las Vegas on Saturday. Raptors: At Miami on Monday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/nba

videos.description: Jalen Brunson pulls up from the baseline and knocks down the jumper for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Brunson sinks jumper from the baseline

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brunson sinks jumper from the baseline) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.description: Brandon Ingram muscles his way to the rack for a tough and-1 for Toronto.
videos.headline: Ingram rattles in and-1 for the Raptors

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Ingram rattles in and-1 for the Raptors) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.description: Scottie Barnes drives along the baseline for a two-handed dunk for the Raptors.
videos.headline: Scottie Barnes throws it down for Toronto

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Scottie Barnes throws it down for Toronto) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns drives between two defenders and drops in a smooth layup for New York.
videos.headline: Towns splits the double team for a Knicks layup

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Towns splits the double team for a Knicks layup) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns gets to the rack for an explosive jam for the Knicks in the second quarter.
videos.headline: Towns amped up after a massive jam for New York

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Towns amped up after a massive jam for New York) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.description: Jordan Clarkson cashes in on a short jumper to extend the Knicks' lead in the first half.
videos.headline: Clarkson's jumper keeps Knicks rolling in 1st half

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Clarkson's jumper keeps Knicks rolling in 1st half) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson pulls up from the wing and sinks the 3-pointer for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Brunson eases in a 3-pointer for the Knicks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brunson eases in a 3-pointer for the Knicks) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.description: Brandon Ingram passes ahead to Ja'Kobe Walter, who throws down a two-handed dunk for Toronto.
videos.headline: Ingram finds Walter for a Raptors flush

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Ingram finds Walter for a Raptors flush) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson torches the Raptors with 35 points as the Knicks win 117-101 to advance to the semifinals of the NBA Cup.
videos.headline: Brunson's big night lifts Knicks to semifinals of NBA Cup

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Brunson's big night lifts Knicks to semifinals of NBA Cup) 2025/12/10 ESHEET SOTFULL
